title: Idioms & Slang
shortSummary: Go beyond textbook Spanish with the idioms, slang, and colloquial expressions that native speakers actually use. From 'No tiene pelos en la lengua' to 'Estar en las nubes' — speak like a local.
whyItMatters: Native speakers pepper their speech with idioms and slang. Understanding and using them signals that you are not just a learner — you are a speaker. They also make your Spanish more colourful, natural, and fun.
coreConcepts: Common Spanish idioms and their origins
Regional slang: Spain vs Mexico vs Argentina vs Colombia
Vulgar expressions and when not to use them
Idiomatic uses of common verbs: dar, echar, meter, poner
Proverbs: En boca cerrada no entran moscas
